# Specification Change

## Change Type

Select one:

- [ ] Editorial (grammar / formatting only)
- [ ] Clarification (no semantic change intended)
- [ ] Structural refactor (reorganization only)
- [ ] Requirement change
- [ ] New requirement
- [ ] Decision proposal

---

## Summary

Describe the purpose of this change.

---

## Affected Sections

List files changed.

Example:

- core/04-parser-contract.md
- subsystems/secobs/07-finding-engine.md

---

## Semantic Impact

Does this change the **meaning** of the specification?

- [ ] No semantic change
- [ ] Minor clarification
- [ ] Behavioral change
- [ ] New requirement introduced

If yes, explain.

---

## Motivation

Why is this change necessary?

Examples:

- contradiction between sections
- missing operational requirement
- ambiguous wording
- subsystem extension

---

## Validation

How can the requirement be verified?

Examples:

- unit tests
- parser corpus validation
- deterministic output comparison
- CLI behavior tests

---

## Cross-Reference Check

Confirm these areas were reviewed if relevant.

- [ ] security implications
- [ ] error handling
- [ ] determinism guarantees
- [ ] versioning compatibility
- [ ] observability/logging

---

## Notes for Reviewers

Anything reviewers should pay attention to.
